description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.45.1

Fixed issues with favorite shop calendar display.

• Fixed favorite shop calendar not appearing when logged in — If you're logged in, your favorite shop's schedule will now show in the daily view on your home screen, even on other devices
• Fixed favorite shop's yesterday's schedule disappearing too quickly — You can now still see yesterday's schedule in the daily view shortly after the date changes

v1.45.0

You can now create printable "shop cards" with store information all in one place.

• 🪪 Generate printable shop cards — 4 sizes available: L-size (portrait or landscape), folded tent card, and business card size. Download or share cards as images with the shop name, address, business hours, contact info, and QR code
• Choose a logo to display on the card — Select from logo options found on the official website, or enter a URL manually. You can also choose a layout with no logo
• Add phone, email, and fax to contact info — In addition to official website and social media, you can now register and display phone, email, and fax numbers
• Official website and phone from Google automatically display — If your shop is on Google, the official website and phone number will automatically appear on the shop page and card without you having to register them separately (shop owners can register different information if they prefer, which takes priority)
• Fixed a bug where "No one has registered yet" sometimes appeared incorrectly while the shop list was loading
